texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Child under 4 years sharing a room is on complimentary; child 5 to 12 years sharing a room is charged 50% of the adult rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING CONDITIONS
texts.text: BOOKING CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Deposits:
texts.text: Deposits:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Overseas Bookings -A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit of 50% of the cost of reserved accommodation is payable by all persons other than those having negotiated agreed credit terms and this amount is payable not later than 35 days prior to the first day of intended occupation.
texts.text:  Overseas Bookings -A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit of 50% of the cost of reserved accommodation is payable by all persons other than those having negotiated agreed credit terms and this amount is payable not later than 35 days prior to the first day of intended occupation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Local bookings - A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit of 50% of the cost of reserved accommodation is payable by all persons other than those having Negotiated agreed credit terms and this amount is payable not later than 30 days prior to the first day of intended occupation.
texts.text:  Local bookings - A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit of 50% of the cost of reserved accommodation is payable by all persons other than those having Negotiated agreed credit terms and this amount is payable not later than 30 days prior to the first day of intended occupation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  These deposits to be offset against the change of accommodation or cancellation fee.
texts.text:  These deposits to be offset against the change of accommodation or cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Bookings should be re-confirmed not later than 35 days prior to the date of arrival.
texts.text: Bookings should be re-confirmed not later than 35 days prior to the date of arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Bookings for JUNE to OCTOBER require a non-refundable deposit of 50% and the balance payable 30 days prior to arrival date.
texts.text: Bookings for JUNE to OCTOBER require a non-refundable deposit of 50% and the balance payable 30 days prior to arrival date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. All overdue accounts shall incur 5% interest per month from due date.
texts.text: All overdue accounts shall incur 5% interest per month from due date.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION POLICY
texts.text: CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A. Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: B. Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: C. Cancellation between 15-1day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 15-1day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT TERMS : BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL
texts.text: PAYMENT TERMS : BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Maisha Sweetwaters Camp thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.
texts.text:  In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Maisha Sweetwaters Camp thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies. These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings. A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases. No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals. We regret
texts.text:  All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies. These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings. A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases. No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals. We regret

texts.label: text
texts.orig: that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.
texts.text: that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.

texts.text: NB: THE RATES ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE DUE TO FLUCTUATION IN MARKET CONDITIONS.
